title: steiractinia aspera
intro: Steiractinia aspera, also known as the Rough Seaside Heliotrope, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Steiractinia aspera include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Steiractinia aspera is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
